login.registeredBanner: Registration complete! Log in with the email and password you set.
login.reactivatedBanner: Payment confirmed! Your club has been reactivated — log in with your credentials.
login.upgradedBanner: Payment confirmed! Log in with your usual credentials.
login.cancelledBanner: The subscription has been cancelled. You can reactivate whenever you like by logging in.
login.suspendedCanReactivate: Reactivate now by paying to regain access.
login.title: Log in
login.subtitle: Enter your credentials to access the system
login.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters

forgotPassword.title: Recover Access
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email to receive reset instructions
forgotPassword.genericError: Error requesting reset. Please try again.
forgotPassword.sentMessage: If this email is registered, you'll receive instructions shortly. Check your spam folder too.

resetPassword.title: New Password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter and confirm your new password
resetPassword.successToast: Password reset! You can now log in.

registerComplete.errorHelp: If the payment was completed, you can log in directly with the email and password you set.
registerComplete.loadingMessage: Confirming payment and preparing your dashboard...
